trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all four signals aligned — RSI in bullish momentum zone, MACD crossover confirmed, histogram rising, and price above SMA-20 — making it the cleanest technical setup in a risk-on session.
Score 95 with full bullish signal stack and low price per share allows meaningful position sizing within remaining cash; RSI 57.4 gives room to run before overbought territory.

decisions.briefing: Strong risk-on day with NASDAQ leading at +1.4%; all six existing positions have no stop-loss triggers and GLXY continues to trend well above its SMA-20. With $1,172 cash and 4 open slots, deploying into INTC and SOC — both score-95 setups with clean momentum stacks — to put idle cash to work rather than let it drag on returns.

market_education.summary_en: Markets rallied broadly today with technology stocks leading the charge, as NASDAQ surged 1.4% versus the S&P 500's 0.8% gain, signaling strong investor appetite for growth assets. The divergence between high-momentum semiconductors like INTC (RSI 56, price above SMA) and laggards like NVDA (RSI 38, below SMA) suggests selective rotation within tech rather than a blanket rally. Risk-on sentiment was confirmed by broad participation across growth sectors, encouraging deployment of cash into momentum leaders.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日全面上揚，科技板塊領漲，那斯達克指數大升1.4%，表現遠優於標普500的0.8%漲幅，顯示市場對成長型資產的強烈偏好。科技股內部出現明顯分化——英特爾等動能強勁的半導體股走強，而NVDA等個股則相對疲弱，反映資金在科技板塊內進行輪動而非全面買入。整體市場情緒偏向風險偏好，為動能策略提供有利環境。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that have been trending upward — in price, volume, and technical indicators — on the belief that assets in motion tend to stay in motion. Today's top picks (INTC, SOC) were selected because multiple momentum signals (RSI in 55–70 zone, MACD crossover, price above SMA) all confirmed the same bullish direction at once. The risk is that momentum can reverse sharply, which is why stop-losses are essential companions to this strategy.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入價格、成交量及技術指標均呈上升趨勢的股票，核心邏輯是「強者恆強」——已在上升軌道中的資產往往會持續運行。今日選入的INTC及SOC正是因為多項動能指標同步確認看漲訊號，包括RSI處於55至70的強勢區間、MACD出現黃金交叉，以及股價站上20日均線。此策略的主要風險在於動能可能急速逆轉，因此止損單是不可或缺的風控工具。
